TextView.android:text: Choose an installed app or browse to an APK, select a DEX entry like classes.dex/classes2.dex, disassemble to smali, assemble back to DEX, then rebuild a signed or debug APK.
The DEX entry is used by single-DEX smali actions and by Java Output when Use selected DEX entry only is checked.
Disassemble selected/all DEX entries to smali, assemble smali back to DEX, and rebuild APK outputs.
Run the standalone jadx-go backend to write best-effort Java output. This does not require smali disassembly first. Leave Use selected DEX entry only unchecked to process every discovered DEX.
Ready. Smali defaults under /sdcard/dev.perms.test/debugging/smali, build outputs under /sdcard/dev.perms.test/debugging/build, and Java under /sdcard/dev.perms.test/debugging/java.

com.google.android.material.button.Mater.android:contentDescription: Pop out Network Inspection / MITM Patch

TextView.android:text: Decode the selected APK with apktool, patch the manifest/network security config and supported smali certificate-pinning methods, rebuild, sign, and export a new APK.
Ready. Uses current APK source. Add apktool to assets/bin/<abi>/apktool when available.
Search smali/java output folders or open generated .java files. The same internal editor switches syntax based on .smali/.java extension.
Ready. Search results open in the internal editor by default.
Open Java or smali to enable source mapping. Java output is a read-only map; smali is the editable repack path.
